settings.title: Settings
settings.saved: Saved. Avatar, theme, and language changes apply immediately.
settings.language.systemPromptHint: Changing this can reduce prompt cache hit rate because stable prompt prefixes change.
settings.language.memoryHint: Changing this can make existing and future memory context appear in mixed languages.
settings.autoMoodHint: Ask the chat model to choose Live2D expression/motion from the current model vocabulary.
settings.keepKey: Leave blank to keep the current key.
settings.autoLoadHint: Starts the inference server on app launch when supported.
settings.modelHint: Use manufacturer/model_name for discovered GGUF files.
settings.scanHint: Scan the configured models_dir for .gguf files.
settings.unloadCommandHint: Empty means terminate the spawned process.
settings.onDemandStartHint: Starts ComfyUI only when an image is requested, then stops the managed process after completion.
settings.pythonHint: Use the Python executable inside conda or venv.
settings.imageWorkflowHint: Requires a LoadImage node for image+text generation.
settings.defaultDenoiseHint: Lower values preserve more of the input image.
settings.maxBytesHint: Applies to local uploads and future screenshots.
settings.levelHint: Higher levels reduce the required idle time.
settings.avatarHint: Image uses a raster file. Live2D uses a .model3.json file. 3D is reserved for future VRM/GLB sidecars.
settings.avatarPrepared3d: 3D model path stored for a future renderer.
settings.live2dNeedsContent: Select prepared Live2D content before testing.
settings.live2dHint: Choose a directory containing a .model3.json file. The runtime files are copied to an ignored local public cache.
settings.digitalHumanHint: 3D model selection is stored now; rendering requires a future VRM/GLB sidecar adapter.
settings.imageHint: Select an image file or use a public-relative path.
role.title: Role Manager
role.name: Name
role.avatarHint: Selected images or Live2D directories are copied into the current role asset directory.
role.idHint: Stable config file id. Use lowercase ASCII, digits, '_' or '-'.
role.nameHint: This and aliases are treated as references to the role itself.
role.setIdFirst: Set a role ID or name before selecting avatar content.
role.avatarCopied: Avatar content copied into this role's asset directory.
role.live2dHint: Choose a directory containing a .model3.json file. Files are copied to the current role asset directory.
role.digitalHumanHint: 3D content is copied and stored now; rendering still requires a future 3D adapter.
role.imageHint: Choose an image file. It is copied to the current role asset directory.
role.generatedDraft: Generated role draft. Review and save it.
image.denoiseHint: Used by image+text workflows with a KSampler denoise input.
